description_long: This is a modern, open-frame shelving unit with a geometric, asymmetrical design. The structure consists of a black metal frame supporting several rectangular wooden shelves, arranged at varying heights and lengths to create a visually interesting pattern. The shelves are a dark brown wood, contrasting with the matte black metal frame, and the open sides and back give the piece a light, airy appearance. There are no doors, drawers, or enclosed compartments, making all surfaces easily accessible for storage or display. The overall form is rectangular, with the shelves providing multiple levels for placing books, decor, or other items. This type of shelving unit is suitable for use in urban environments such as lofts, offices, or public spaces.
description: A modern, open-frame shelving unit with a black metal structure and dark brown wooden shelves arranged in an asymmetrical pattern. The design is airy and accessible, ideal for display or storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full geometric arrangement of shelves and the open, accessible design.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile and the depth of the shelves, with the open frame visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the shelf layout and open structure from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the alignment of the shelves within the frame.
